emergency_definition: Fire alarm signal showing a live condition on a panel
Smoke smell reported at a site
Flooding from a pipe failure related to our systems
Fire panel fault showing a zone in alarm
Carbon monoxide alarm in a building we maintain

non_emergency_routing_rules.message_to_caller: We'll follow up next business day.

call_transfer_rules.pre_transfer_message: I was unable to reach our on-call team directly, but I've sent them your information and they'll call you back within 15 minutes. Please keep your phone nearby.
call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_message: I was unable to reach our on-call team directly, but I've sent them your information and they'll call you back within 15 minutes. Please keep your phone nearby.

integration_constraints: Never create a sprinkler job order directly from a Clara call
All jobs must go through our estimating team
Extinguisher work is okay, but not sprinkler or alarm panel work
after_hours_flow_summary: Collect name, number, brief description, and tell them we'll follow up next business day. No escalation.
office_hours_flow_summary: Dispatch line, then Brett's cell, then Diana's cell, then send a text to all three numbers with the caller's information and log it.
notes: VIP accounts: Lone Star Brewery, DFW Airport Cargo (one warehouse), and Garland ISD
